title: ResponseIndicator
description:
An indicator to help explain the status of the account being inquired on. Possible values are:
* `VALID` = Matches the account as reported by the issuer.
* `UNKNOWN` = Account number is not known to ABU or part of a participating BIN (Bank Identification Number) and/or issuer.
* `NON_PARTICIPATING` = Account number is not known to ABU or part of a non-participating BIN (Bank Identification Number) and/or issuer.
* `CONTACT` (C) = Contact the issuer.
* `EXPIRY` (E) = The card inquired on is expired, updated expiry date returned.
* `ACCOUNT_UPDATE` (A) = The card inquired on is updated, updated card number and expiry date returned.
